# Case recovery-cacheable: Step 2

## Changed Files
- change.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 28
- Update: main.hot-update.js, size: 1060

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./change.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./change.css"(module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
// extracted by css-extract-rspack-plugin

    if(true) {
      (function() {
        var localsJsonString = undefined;
        var cssReload = (__rspack_require("../../../../../../../../packages/rspack/dist/cssExtractHmr.js")/* .cssReload */.cssReload)(module.id, {});
        // only invalidate when locals change
        if (
          module.hot.data &&
          module.hot.data.value &&
          module.hot.data.value !== localsJsonString
        ) {
          module.hot.invalidate();
        } else {
          module.hot.accept();
        }
        module.hot.dispose(function(data) {
          data.value = localsJsonString;
          cssReload();
        });
      })();
    }
  

},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
